chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 442 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of bail application 25.09.2023 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate has filed power on behalf of complainant, which is taken on record. Learned Counsel for the applicant does not press this bail application, as according to him, the applicant has been declared innocent in investigation and such report has been submitted before the Judicial Magistrate concerned, which is pending orders. In view of above, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
